title: BUG #18103: bugs of concurrent merge into when use different join plan
poc: create table t1(a int not null, b int);
create table t2(a int not null, b int);
key_bug_features: concurrent merge with different join plans
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a int NOT NULL, b text DEFAULT 'default');
CREATE TABLE t2(a int NOT NULL, b text DEFAULT 'default');
INSERT INTO t1 SELECT generate_series(1, 5), 'value' || generate_series(1, 5);
